name: Sara Jacobs
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $289,190 for Sara Jacobs in U.S. House, CA-51. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
